sourceSummary.oneLine: Presentation introducing H&Aby Detector and CsI products, CsI deposition, and DR Digital Radiography manufacturing processes.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Internal manufacturing education or process overview material for Detector, CsI, and DR manufacturing teams.
keyPoints: X-Ray photons passing through an object are converted to visible light by a CsI scintillator, then converted by a TFT Panel photo diode into analog electrical signals and digitized for imaging.

The CsI deposition process includes incoming inspection, CsI deposition, thickness measurement, aging, visual inspection, Plasma/UVO3 treatment, seal coating, vacuum lamination, UV curing, and final visual inspection.
The Detector OEM process includes incoming inspection, laser scribing, OLB/PB bonding, image inspection, assembly, electro and burning tests, final test, and shipment inspection.

concepts.evidence: Detector 조립 완제품 대한 유 / 무선 통신 상태 및 고온에서의 구동 상태 검사

evidence.claim: The document title is H&Aby 제품 및 공정소개.
The presentation covers Detector and CsI product introduction, CsI process introduction, and DR manufacturing team process introduction.
evidence.evidenceText: Contents Detector 및 CsI 제품 소개 1 CsI 공정 소개 2 3 DR(Digital Radiography) 제조팀 공정 소개

evidence.claim: During X-Ray imaging, transmitted X-rays are digitized through a Flat Panel Digital Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: X-Ray 촬영 시 투과된 X- 선을 Flat Panel Digital Detector 를 통해 디지털 영상화

evidence.claim: The document states that digitalization makes data transmission and storage easier.
evidence.evidenceText: 정보의 디지털화로 데이터 전송 및 보관 용이

evidence.claim: A CsI scintillator converts X-Ray photons passing through an object into visible light.
evidence.evidenceText: Object 를 투과한 X-Ray 광자를 가시광선으로 변환 ( CsI Scintillator )

evidence.claim: A TFT Panel photo diode reacts to converted visible light and converts it into an analog electrical signal.
evidence.evidenceText: 변환된 가시 광선만큼 TFT Panel 의 Photo Diode 가 반응 , 전기적 신호 (Analog) 로 변환

evidence.claim: The analog signal is converted to a digital signal and imaged for display.
evidence.evidenceText: 영상으로 표현 하기 위해 Analog 신호를 Digital 신호로 변화 및 영상화

evidence.claim: CsI deposition uses high-temperature vacuum deposition of CsI + Tl material on the top side of a TFT Panel.
evidence.evidenceText: CsI + Tl 소재에 대한 TFT Panel 상면 고온 진공 증착

evidence.claim: The CsI thickness measurement process is a non-contact measurement to confirm deposited CsI thickness and uniformity on the TFT Panel.
evidence.evidenceText: TFT Panel 에 증착된 CsI 두께 및 Uniformity 에 대한 품질 확인 목적의 비접촉 측정

evidence.claim: The CsI aging process is performed at 120℃ for 72 hours.
Plasma/UVO3 treatment is used to secure adhesion between the reflective sheet and deposited panel.
evidence.evidenceText: 반사 Sheet 와 증착 Panel 의 접착력 확보를 위한 Plasma / UVO3 처리

evidence.claim: The Detector OEM process includes incoming inspection, laser scribing, OLB/PB bonding, image inspection, assembly, ET and BT, final test, and shipment inspection.
evidence.evidenceText: Detector OEM 공정 Process #2 CsI 증착 #1 수입검사 #2 Laser Scribe #3 OLB/PB Bonding #4 M/T 공정 #5 조립공정 #6 ET & BT #7 F/T 공정 #8 출하검사

evidence.claim: Detector final inspection checks image acquisition after irradiating the Detector product with X-Ray.
evidence.evidenceText: Detector 제품에 X-Ray 를 조사하여 영상 취득 상태에 대한 검사

evidence.claim: Shipment inspection includes issuing a report based on final Detector image inspection and packaging by specification.
evidence.evidenceText: Detector 제품 최종 영상검사에 따른 성적서 발행 및 규격 별 포장
